evidence.snippet: Ability Composites is a small business specializing in **carbon fiber and fiberglass composite part manufacturing.** Our experienced personnel have a passion for innovation and understand how best to tool up a composite part. We support the medical, aerospace, and high-end industrial markets.

Ability Composites’ personnel have years of experience with high quality **aerospace composites manufacturing**. Areas of expertise include composite radome systems, antenna enclosures (fairings), and small unmanned aircraft.  Our team works to the rigorous process controls and stringent quality of aerospace parts.

items.notes: Carbon fiber and fiberglass composite parts manufacturing for aerospace (including UAS), medical, and industrial markets

products_categories.notes: Vendor is primarily a contract composite manufacturer. UAS-specific work mentioned as part of aerospace composites segment.

evidence.snippet: Ability Composites is a composite manufacturer located in Loveland, CO. Classified as a small business, Ability Composites has capabilities which rival many large companies. Customer satisfaction is what the company was established on and will always be the ultimate priority.

Ability Composites’ personnel have years of experience with high quality **aerospace composites manufacturing**. Areas of expertise include composite radome systems, antenna enclosures (fairings), and small unmanned aircraft.  Our team works to the rigorous process controls and stringent quality of aerospace parts.

Unmanned Aerial Systems
-----------------------
With a history of design and manufacturing of aircraft, we’re proudly expanding our capabilities to accommodate this fast growing market.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Makes composite structural parts (radomes, fairings, airframe structures) for UAS and aerospace customers as a contract manufacturer. Also mentions expanding into UAS manufacturing but no named complete UAS products.

items.name: Composite Radomes
items.product_type: RF-transparent composite radome structures for aerospace and ground-based systems

evidence.snippet: ### **Ability Composites specializes in radomes for aerospace and ground based systems.**

items.name: Composite Overwrapped Pressure Vessels (COPV)
items.product_type: Filament-wound composite pressure vessels for aerospace and satellite applications

evidence.snippet: Ability Composites manufactures composite pressure vessels (COPV manufacturing) for various industries using our 4 axis filament winding machine.  The developed in-house manufacturing process includes filament winding, pressure testing, and autofrettaging.

items.name: Filament Winding Services
items.product_type: CNC filament winding for pressure vessels, tubes, and drive shafts

evidence.snippet: Ability Composites has two CNC filament winding machines and the expertise to take on most projects. One machine is a 4-axis prepreg winder, the other is a 2-axis wet winder. Some recent projects include; pressure vessels for the aerospace market, large diameter carbon fiber tubes used in the nuclear industry, and thin walled square carbon fiber tubes for robotic systems.

items.name: Composite Layup Services
items.product_type: Carbon fiber and fiberglass composite layup manufacturing

products.notes: Vendor is a contract composite manufacturer; offerings are service/part categories rather than named SKU products.

evidence.snippet:
*   12,000 ft Manufacturing Facility
*   Filament Winding Machines
*   5-axis Router

*   More…

readiness.notes: AS9100D:2016 & ISO 9001:2015 certified contract manufacturer with 12,000 sq ft facility, filament winding machines, 5-axis router, and industrial autoclave.

unresolved_questions: Whether the SuperSwift image on the aerospace page represents a named UAS product they make or a customer's aircraft
Whether they have NDAA compliance given their aerospace/defense customer base (AS9100D certified)

fetch_requests.reason: Would confirm whether Ability Composites makes complete UAS structures or only supplies composite parts to UAS customers; could clarify drone_supply_chain_role and products.
fetch_requests.source_hint: guessed from aerospace page UAS section link

tagline: AS9100D-certified composite manufacturing and engineering for aerospace, medical, and industrial applications. Specializes in radomes, filament-wound pressure vessels, layup, and tooling. Colorado-based small business with 12,000 sq ft facility. NDAA compliance status and unmanned-systems program involvement not publicly disclosed.
